BatchEvidenceImportRequest.description: Batch import of validated upstream evidence (functional/phenotype/family/...).
BatchEvidenceImportRequest.title: BatchEvidenceImportRequest

CaseAttachRequest.description: Link a persisted classification receipt to a case.
CaseAttachRequest.title: CaseAttachRequest

CaseBulkAssignRequest.description:
Assign (or, with ``assigned_to: null``, unassign) many cases at once.

``assigned_to`` is required so the action is always explicit — send an
explicit ``null`` to bulk-unassign. Each case is applied independently; the
response reports per-case success/failure.
CaseBulkAssignRequest.title: CaseBulkAssignRequest

CaseBulkTransitionRequest.description:
Move many cases to ``to_status`` at once; each is validated independently
against its own current status (so a mixed-status selection transitions the
legal cases and reports the rest).
CaseBulkTransitionRequest.title: CaseBulkTransitionRequest

CaseCreateRequest.description: Open a new worklist case (one ordered specimen under review).
CaseCreateRequest.title: CaseCreateRequest

CaseTransitionRequest.description: Move a case to a new status in the pipeline (state-machine validated).
CaseTransitionRequest.title: CaseTransitionRequest

CaseUpdateRequest.description:
Patch a case's operational fields. Omitted fields are left unchanged;
an explicit ``null`` for ``assigned_to`` unassigns the case.
CaseUpdateRequest.title: CaseUpdateRequest

ClassifyRequest.description: Stateless classification preview (no persistence, no sign-off).
ClassifyRequest.title: ClassifyRequest

CoverageRequest.description: Record/refresh an evidence-coverage observation for one (tenant, variant).
CoverageRequest.title: CoverageRequest

CurationScanRequest.description: Resolve a variant, surface curation items, and optionally enqueue them.
CurationScanRequest.title: CurationScanRequest

EvidenceInput.description:
Evidence for classify/persist/reanalysis, given one of three ways.

Exactly one (or none) of ``events`` / ``signals`` / ``resolve`` selects how
evidence is obtained; an entirely empty input is allowed and yields a
no-evidence (VUS) draft with an explicit warning rather than an error.
EvidenceInput.title: EvidenceInput

ImportPreviewRequest.description: Dry-run VCF/CSV variant import: normalize, dedup, optional resolve preview.
ImportPreviewRequest.title: ImportPreviewRequest

PersistRequest.description: Persist a classification receipt for a (tenant, optional patient, variant).
PersistRequest.title: PersistRequest

ProviderInfo.description: One configured evidence provider: its registry name and source version.
ProviderInfo.title: ProviderInfo

ProvidersResponse.description: The configured evidence providers, for the reviewer UI provider panel.
ProvidersResponse.title: ProvidersResponse

ReanalysisRequest.description: Recompute a variant from current evidence; persist/alert only on change.
ReanalysisRequest.title: ReanalysisRequest

ResolveRequest.description: Resolve evidence for a variant through configured providers.
ResolveRequest.title: ResolveRequest

ReviewerEvidenceRequest.description: Reviewer/pipeline-entered structured evidence for one variant (job1 task 1).
ReviewerEvidenceRequest.title: ReviewerEvidenceRequest

SignOffRequest.description: Credentialed human sign-off releasing a draft for clinical use.
SignOffRequest.title: SignOffRequest

VariantRef.description:
A variant identified by genomic locus and/or a ClinVar Variation ID.

At least one usable identity must be present: a complete ``(chrom, pos, ref,
alt)`` locus and/or a ``variation_id``. An empty/partial reference is an
*invalid variant identity* and is rejected with HTTP 422.
VariantRef.title: VariantRef

info.description: Tenant-aware service surface over the deterministic ACMG/AMP reclassification engine. Decision support only — no result is clinically released without credentialed sign-off.
info.title: Variant Reclassification API

get.description: List tenant curation work items, optionally filtered by kind / state.

post.description: Resolve a variant, surface curation gaps, and (optionally) enqueue them.

post.description: Batch-import upstream evidence; PHI is scrubbed before any research mapping.

post.description: Dry-run VCF/CSV import: identity normalization, dedup, evidence-resolve preview.

schema.title: Response Import Preview Evidence Import Preview Post

get.description:
List the *configured* evidence providers and their source versions.

De-identified (no patient data, no variant), like resolve. The reviewer UI
uses this to populate its provider panel without first running a resolve, so
the available provider set is never hardcoded on the client.
The ACMG criteria the workbench is built to capture (drives the UI panel).

schema.title: Response Workbench Criteria Evidence Workbench Criteria Get

get.description: List reviewer-entered evidence, optionally filtered by variant key / status.

schema.title: Response List Reviewer Evidence Evidence Workbench Evidence Get

post.description: Persist one reviewer-entered structured evidence record with full provenance.

post.description: Transition a reviewer evidence record's status (e.g. withdraw / supersede).

post.description: Expire active reviewer evidence past its re-review deadline (re-review gate).

schema.title: Response Expire Reviewer Evidence Evidence Workbench Expire Post

Assign or unassign many cases in one call. Per-case partial success: the
response carries a ``summary`` and an ordered ``results`` list.

legal cases and reports the rest in ``results``.
